name: Open Bank
description_short: Open Bank is a multi-location bank offering online and mobile banking, cash management, SBA loans up to $5M, home loans, and fund transfer services through Zelle.
description_long: Open Bank operates as a full-service bank with headquarters in Los Angeles, California and multiple branch locations across California, Texas, Washington, Virginia, Georgia, and Colorado. The institution provides comprehensive banking services including online and mobile banking platforms, e-statements, and remote deposit capture (RDC) functionality for retail customers. Beyond consumer banking, Open Bank specializes in business lending, offering SBA 7(a) loans up to the maximum amount of $5 million and business lines of credit. They also provide home loan products positioned as fast financial solutions tailored to individual borrower needs. The bank maintains a significant lending infrastructure with Loan Production Offices (LPOs) in multiple states and a dedicated Home Loan Center. Open Bank emphasizes security and convenience, featuring integration with Zelle for peer-to-peer payments, account-to-account transfers, and external account linking. The organization also references community investment and diversity initiatives through the Open Stewardship Foundation. Their service hours are consistent across locations (9am-5pm in respective time zones, Monday-Friday, excluding federal holidays), and they maintain dedicated phone lines for customer service at each location.
pros: Nationwide presence with 10+ physical branch locations plus LPOs across six states
Offers specialized SBA 7(a) loans up to $5 million for small business owners
Integrated Zelle functionality for fast, safe peer-to-peer money transfers
Multiple banking channels including online banking, mobile app, and in-person locations
Remote Deposit Capture (RDC) available for convenient check deposits
Dedicated home loan services with fast processing and a dedicated loan center
Account-to-account transfer capabilities with external account linking
Green e-statements option for paperless banking
cons: Limited service hours (9am-5pm weekdays only, excluding holidays) with no 24/7 availability mentioned
No mention of 24/7 customer support or after-hours emergency contact procedures beyond closing browser
Website does not display specific product terms, rates, fees, or APR information for loans or accounts
No information provided about minimum deposit requirements, account types, or deposit insurance details
Limited detail on home loan options—no mention of FHA, VA, refinance, or specific loan programs
best_for: Small to mid-sized business owners seeking SBA loans up to $5 million
Home buyers in California, Texas, Washington, Virginia, Georgia, or Colorado seeking expedited mortgage solutions
Consumers preferring in-person banking combined with modern digital services
Businesses needing cash management and fund transfer services
diagnosis: Open Bank is best suited for small to mid-sized business owners seeking SBA loans and homebuyers in their service areas who prefer a bank combining physical locations with digital banking convenience. The main caveat is the lack of specific rate, fee, and product term information on the website, requiring direct contact with branches for detailed pricing and eligibility requirements.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
